description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.5-alpine Docker image and caching pip packages in /root/.cache/pip. Install build dependencies with apk (build-base, libffi-dev, openssl-dev, git) and install docs, runtime and test requirements in a global before_script. Define a check_code job that runs on all branches except master@gitmate/open-source/IGitt, installing coala-bears[alldeps] and executing coala --ci. Define a run_tests job (also excluded on master) that runs python3 -m pytest, executes .ci/no_yaml.sh, and builds documentation with python3 setup.py docs. Define a release job that runs only on branches matching /^release\/.*$/@gitmate/open-source/IGitt, installs twine<1.2>, adjusts the version with .ci/adjust_version.py using the current UTC timestamp, builds source and wheel distributions with python setup.py sdist bdist_wheel, uploads them to PyPI via twine using $PYPIUSER and $PYPIPW, and then runs .ci/push_tags.sh. Define a release_master job that runs only on master@gitmate/open-source/IGitt, performs the same version adjustment, build and upload steps (without pushing tags).
